title: DuPont Analysis Input
description: Required and optional inputs for executing the DuPont Analysis skill.

problem_statement.description: The business problem or diagnostic question to be analyzed.

company_context.description: Company background, industry, size, and relevant business context.

total_shareholders_equity.description: Total shareholders' equity (average for the period)

interest_expense_pre.description: Interest expense and pre-tax income (for 5-factor extension)

tax_expense.description: Tax expense (to isolate tax burden factor in the 5-factor model)

peer_company_financials.description: Peer company financials for cross-sectional benchmarking
